title: RenewalOutreachMockSendRequest
description: Engine request to mock-send a reviewed renewal outreach draft (F0038-S0006). Mock-send COMMITS the real Identified -> Outreach WorkflowTransition (emitting WorkflowTransition + a 'sent (simulated)' ActivityTimelineEvent) but FAKES SMTP delivery — no real email is dispatched. Authorized engine-side by renewal:draft_outreach (Underwriter only); the renewal must be in Identified (valid Identified -> Outreach move). Transition + both events are atomic (all-or-nothing). Requires If-Match (rowVersion) per the renewal mutation contract.

final_draft_body.description: The finalized (reviewed/edited) draft content at send time. Same content constraints as the draft.

draft_timeline_event_id.description: Id of the draft ActivityTimelineEvent (F0038-S0005) this send finalizes; links the draft and the simulated-send events on the timeline.

simulate_delivery.description: Always true in v1. The engine MUST guarantee no real SMTP/transport path is invoked when this is set.

agent_run_id.description: Neuron agent_run id for idempotent cross-store reconciliation (ADR-028).
